name: a6_contract_drift
outcome_goal: Every contract under contracts/ and runtime/*_contract.py has a producer-to-consumer round-trip test; drift cases are filed as bugs.

jobs.label: a6_contract_drift
jobs.prompt: Audit typed contract drift and add or identify producer-to-consumer round-trip coverage. Targets: Code&DBs/Workflow/contracts/domain.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/contracts/data_contracts.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/dependency_contract.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/build_planning_contract.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/topology_contract.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/submission_contract.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/provider_types.py. For each contract, name producer, consumer, serialization/deserialization boundary, current tests, missing round-trip coverage, and drift risks. Add focused tests where scope is clear; file canonical bugs with signature contract-drift::<contract> where broader fixes are needed. Verify with the contract pytest command.
